'''tadhozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gracilis|gracilis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gracilis|gracilis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tadhozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhezeth|tædhezeth]] || [[word:tædhezej|tædhezej]] || [[word:tædhezesh|tædhezesh]] || [[word:tædheze|tædheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhodhozoth|tadhodhozoth]] || [[word:tadhodhozoj|tadhodhozoj]] || [[word:tadhodhozosh|tadhodhozosh]] || [[word:tadhodhozo|tadhodhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhozoth|tadhozoth]] || [[word:tadhozoj|tadhozoj]] || [[word:tadhozosh|tadhozosh]] || [[word:tadhozo|tadhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhofzoth|tadhofzoth]] || [[word:tadhofzoj|tadhofzoj]] || [[word:tadhofzosh|tadhofzosh]] || [[word:tadhofzof|tadhofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhozotho|tadhozotho]] || [[word:tadhozojo|tadhozojo]] || [[word:tadhozosho|tadhozosho]] || [[word:tadhozoko|tadhozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhozoth|tadhozoth]] || [[word:tadhozoj|tadhozoj]] || [[word:tadhozosh|tadhozosh]] || [[word:tadhozo|tadhozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhozothol|tadhozothol]] || [[word:tadhozojol|tadhozojol]] || [[word:tadhozoshol|tadhozoshol]] || [[word:tadhozokol|tadhozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhozothotho|tadhozothotho]] || [[word:tadhozojojo|tadhozojojo]] || [[word:tadhozoshosho|tadhozoshosho]] || [[word:tadhozoko|tadhozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhozothon|tadhozothon]] || [[word:tadhozojon|tadhozojon]] || [[word:tadhozoshon|tadhozoshon]] || [[word:tadhozokon|tadhozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhozothoro|tadhozothoro]] || [[word:tadhozojoro|tadhozojoro]] || [[word:tadhozoshoro|tadhozoshoro]] || [[word:tadhozokoro|tadhozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
